channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Chargers' Jim Harbaugh says cardiologist told him he has 'the heart of an athlete' following medical scare
item.description: Los Angeles Chargers head coach Jim Harbaugh said his doctors told him that he has "the heart of an athlete" following his medical scare during the Chargers last game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Criticism sparked over Snapdragon Stadium field conditions
item.description: The San Diego Wave FC lost 1-0 to Mexico’s Club America Wednesday. Both teams are advancing to the semifinals, but it was the turf that was the talk of the tailgate.
item.dc:creator: Jaime Chambers, Fox 5

item.title: Photos: Golden State Warriors host open practice for fans at San Francisco’s Chase Center
item.description: Fans got to interact with the Golden State Warriors during their open practice on Wednesday night at the Chase Center.
item.dc:creator: Jane Tyska, The Mercury News

item.title: Dodgers lead Mets 2-1 ahead of NLCS Game 4
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — On a night of misplayed comebackers, the New York Mets put themselves in a need of yet another comeback. Luis Severino twice botched grounders, leading to a pair of unearned runs in the second inning.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Dodgers manager praises Walker Buehler's NLCS outing after prior struggles in return from Tommy John surgery
item.description: Walker Buehler tossed four scoreless inning in his start on Wednesday against the Mets in which his Dodgers took a 2-1 lead in the NLCS.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: At the midpoint of the season, Penn State in-line to host playoff game
item.description: UNIVERSITY PARK (Nittany Nation) At 6-0, Penn State moved up to no. 3 in this week's AP Top-25, their highest ranking since 2017. The Nittany Lions are in their second bye week and at the mid-point of their regular season Penn State would be seeded fifth in the College Football Playoffs.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Clay, PHL 17

item.title: Big Game Bound: Texans head to Lambeau Field in AFC/NFC clash
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS — The NFC North is proving to be the best division in football through the first six weeks of the NFL season. Minnesota (5-0), Detroit (4-1), Chicago (4-2) and Green Bay (4-2) have a combined .773 winning percentage, the highest by a division at week 7 or later in league history.
item.dc:creator: Phil Nardiello - Senior Sports Producer, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl loss still stings for the 49ers headed into rematch against the Chiefs
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Eight months later, the pain of losing a second Super Bowl in five seasons to the Kansas City Chiefs has barely subsided for the San Francisco 49ers as they prepare for a rare regular-season rematch.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: 49ers forced to relive film of Super Bowl LVIII — including fateful fourth-and-1 vs. Chiefs
item.description: Preparation to face the Chiefs Sunday for the 49ers included film review of last season's 25-22 overtime loss in Super Bowl LVIII in Las Vega
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: Newly acquired wide receiver Davante Adams expects to play for Jets on Sunday night vs. Steelers
item.description: FLORHAM PARK, N.J. (AP) — Davante Adams will be Aaron Rodgers' house guest for a while, at least until the New York Jets' newly acquired wide receiver gets situated. So, they drove together to the team facility Wednesday morning.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Transgender athlete defeated by woman competitor at major UK competition championship in epic comeback
item.description: Welsh woman Kirsty-Lee Davies defeated transgender competitor Harriet Haynes in the U.K. Mini Series pool championships this past weekend in comeback fashion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former SJSU basketball standout found dead in Romania
item.description: (KRON) -- Former San Jose State University Women's Basketball standout Tyra Whitehead has passed away, according to a social media post from SJSU Women's Basketball. Whitehead was a forward who went on to become a WNBA prospect with the Washington Mystics.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: TNT and its sports platforms to show new Unrivaled women's 3-on-3 basketball league games
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — The new Unrivaled women's basketball 3-on-3 league will have its games broadcast on TNT and its sports platforms. The league announced a multi-year partnership with the network to show more than 45 games from the inaugural season that begins in January.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Alex Cobb was dropped from Cleveland's American League Championship Series roster on Tuesday after he got hurt yet again in the opener, leaving the Guardians in search of a Game 5 starter against the New York Yankees. “It’s been a challenging year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Each Mets, Yankees home game generates over $20 million for NYC
item.description: NEW YORK CITY (PIX11) – With a potential Subway World Series around the corner, New Yorkers are spending big on the Yankees and Mets.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, PIX 11

item.title: The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta's Mercedes-Benz Stadium in 2028
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Super Bowl will return to Atlanta in 2028 at the home of the Falcons, following a vote of approval by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Nevada could be latest to forfeit SJSU volleyball match amidst transgender lawsuit
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (KRON) -- The University of Nevada, Reno (UNR) could be the latest team to forfeit a women's volleyball match against San Jose State University.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Mets add McNeil to NLCS roster while Dodgers drop Vesia and Rojas, add Kiermaier and Honeywell
item.description: Jeff McNeil was added to the New York Mets' roster for the NL Championship Series against the Los Angeles Dodgers after recovering from a broken right wrist. Right-handed reliever Adam Ottavino was dropped from the Mets' roster. Tommy Edman will start at shortstop throughout the NLCS, Roberts said.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Winners of the 2024 Bank of America Chicago Marathon
item.description: Runners from across the world gathered in Chicago Sunday for the 2024 Bank of America Chicago Marathon.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, WGN 9

item.title: Bears dominate Jaguars in London, 35-16, to extend winning streak to 3 games going into bye week
item.description: The Bears capped off their London trip in style Sunday, routing the Jacksonville Jaguars, 35-16, at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium to extend their winning streak to three games and improve to 4-2 on the season.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Keller scores game-winner in OT as Utah HC stays unbeaten
item.description: NEW YORK (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club took a big bite out of the Big Apple this week. After an overtime win over the New York Islanders on Thursday, Utah did the same thing to the Rangers at Madison Square Garden on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Vasily Espindola and the Redland Chargers take on the Fruita Cowboys
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—In a dramatic 10U football playoff game, the Redland Chargers overcame a 13-point deficit in the second quarter, despite losing their starting quarterback to injury.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Thomas hits grand slam off Skubal, Guardians down Tigers 7-3 to reach AL Championship Series
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — For the third time in less than a month, the Cleveland Guardians made a semi-circle in the middle of their clubhouse and emptied champagne and beer bottles on each other as “Rocky Top” blasted through the speakers. The choice of music is unique. So is this team.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Los Angeles Dodgers announce starting pitcher for NLCS Game 1
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers relied on spectacular pitching to escape the NL Division Series in five games against the San Diego Padres, and it's nearly time to see if those performances will carry over into the NL Championship Series.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Kucherov scores go-ahead goal, two empty-netters to push Lightning past Hurricanes in season opener
item.description: Nikita Kucherov had a third-period hat trick to help the Tampa Bay Lightning beat the Carolina Hurricanes 4-1 in Friday night's season opener for both teams.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Padres eliminated from playoffs after loss to Dodgers in Game 5 of NLDS
item.description: The Padres playoff road has come to an end after losing to the Los Angeles Dodgers 2-0 in Game 5 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall will return to practice for the 1st time since he was shot
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — San Francisco 49ers rookie receiver Ricky Pearsall is set to return to practice next week for the first time since he was shot in the chest in a robbery attempt nine days before the season opener.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Utah HC wins overtime thriller over Islanders, 5-4
item.description: LONG ISLAND, N.Y. (ABC4 Sports) - In its first ever road game, the Utah Hockey Club proved to be extremely resilient. Dylan Guenther scored his second goal at 2:18 of overtime, and the Utah Hockey Club rallied for a 5-4 win against the New York Islanders at UBS Arena on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Golden State Valkyries name team's first head coach
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Twenty years after playing professional women’s basketball in San Jose, Natalie Nakase is returning to the Bay Area after being named Thursday as the Golden State Valkyries' first head coach.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4
